expectations.evidence: Explicitly stated: '换 PostgreSQL 不是解决问题，是换一个更复杂的问题'. Provided a when-to-switch decision table. Quote: '带着问题搬家——你大概率会在 PostgreSQL 上遇到新的连接池/事务隔离问题'

Verified WAL with PRAGMA journal_mode, timeout with PRAGMA busy_timeout, connection closing patterns, transaction types (BEGIN vs BEGIN IMMEDIATE vs EXCLUSIVE). Distinguished SQLITE_BUSY(5) vs SQLITE_LOCKED(6).
Investigated multi-process workers, NFS/network filesystem, connection leaks, long transactions, cursor conflicts. Docker container checks included.
Provided diagnostic commands: fuser, lsof, ls -la, df -T, docker inspect, connection tracking code. Also provided code snippets for detecting leaks.
